title: Spawn Egg Preview
description: A simple client-side mod that replaces spawn egg textures with 3D models of their entities, enhancing visibility without changing gameplay.
body:
# Spawn Egg Preview

## Description
This mod makes spawn eggs display 3D models of their corresponding entities in the inventory and hand, instead of the regular colored egg texture.

## Features
1. Client-side only, no need to install on the server.
2. Spawn eggs show real entity models in inventory, hotbar, hand, and GUIs.
3. Models automatically scale to ensure full display in slots.
4. Doesn't affect gameplay, only a visual enhancement.

## Closing Note
Make spawn eggs more intuitive — recognize the creature inside at a glance.
